query: SELECT CONCAT(p.id, '|', p.tenantId, '|', p.name, '|', p.pipelineType, '|', p.isDefault, '|', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pipeline_stages ps WHERE ps.pipelineId = p.id)) as info FROM pipelines p ORDER BY p.tenantId, p.id;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4Nn3NsgWfgWMEmv.e05a65be2af1 --database EKvcVicuVoUxTnzjSKzgdk --execute SELECT CONCAT(p.id, '|', p.tenantId, '|', p.name, '|', p.pipelineType, '|', p.isDefault, '|', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pipeline_stages ps WHERE ps.pipelineId = p.id)) as info FROM pipelines p ORDER BY p.tenantId, p.id;
